title: microchilus pseudocaucanus
intro: Microchilus pseudocaucanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, headache, and skin issues. The plant has been traditionally used to provide relief from fever and headaches due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, offering health benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation. The herbal preparation of Microchilus pseudocaucanus often involves decoction or infusion of the roots or leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
